---
name: Spec/contract diff
about: The OpenAPI spec or a shared doc changed in a way that affects the other side
title: '`<surface>`: <what changed>'
labels: type:spec-diff, status:open
---

**Owed by:** side:hospitality / side:flutter (whoever needs to react, apply the matching label, delete this line)

**Surface:** (endpoint path, or doc name)

**Old shape:**


**New shape:**


**Shipped in:** (service + version, e.g. `platform-service v1.0.xxx`)

**Backwards-compatible?** yes / no — if no, explain the breaking part.
